mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id, student_id, feedback_date, dimension, score, comment, is_analyzed, created_at FROM feedback WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND feedback_date = #{feedbackDate} ORDER BY created_at
SELECT id, course_id, student_id, feedback_date, dimension, score, comment, is_analyzed, created_at FROM feedback WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY feedback_date
SELECT id, course_id, student_id, feedback_date, dimension, score, comment, is_analyzed, created_at FROM feedback WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY feedback_date
SELECT id, course_id, student_id, feedback_date, dimension, score, comment, is_analyzed, created_at FROM feedback WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY feedback_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (course_id, student_id, feedback_date, dimension, score, comment) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{studentId}, #{feedbackDate}, #{dimension}, #{score}, #{comment})
